chunks.title: Naaman's Journey to Israel
chunks.reason: Introduces Naaman's status and his arrival in Israel with a letter from the king of Aram.

chunks.title: Healing at the Jordan
chunks.reason: Describes Elisha's instruction, Naaman's initial anger, his servants' counsel, and his eventual healing.

chunks.title: Naaman's Confession and Departure
chunks.reason: Contains the dialogue where Naaman acknowledges Yahweh and Elisha refuses his gifts before sending him away.

chunks.title: Gehazi's Deception and Punishment
chunks.reason: Narrates Gehazi's pursuit of Naaman, his lie to Elisha, and the resulting punishment of leprosy.
